scripts.deploy: bun run build:client && wrangler deploy && wrangler d1 migrations apply DB --remote
scripts.check: bun run build:client && wrangler types --check --env-file .dev.vars.example && tsc --noEmit && wrangler deploy --dry-run

BETTER_AUTH_SECRET.description: Generate a unique secret with `openssl rand -hex 32`. It signs Better Auth cookies and tokens.

ADMIN_TOKEN.description: Generate a different secret with `openssl rand -hex 32`. The Bun CLI uses it for migrations, invitations, recovery, and OIDC client provisioning.

CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Cloudflare account ID containing the reusable enrollment policy.

ACCESS_POLICY_ID.description: ID of a reusable Allow policy containing only exact Email selectors.

CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.description: A restricted token with Access: Apps and Policies Read for the selected account.

TURNSTILE_SITE_KEY.description: Public site key for a managed Turnstile widget configured for the Worker hostname.

TURNSTILE_SECRET_KEY.description: Secret key for the same Turnstile widget.

INVITATION_FROM.description: Onboarded Cloudflare Email Sending address, such as auth@send.example.com.
